arts.ttl: Liverpool XI vs Southampton – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Liverpool continue their defence of the Carabao Cup with a trip to the south coast to take on Southampton. Arne Slot’s side can move into the semi-finals with a win at St Mary’s, as the Dutchman targets silverware in his first season in charge. arts.ttl: Southampton vs Liverpool – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Managerless Southampton welcome Liverpool to St. Mary’s Stadium in the Carabao Cup quarter-finals tonight. Russell Martin was relieved of his duties as Southampton manager after his side lost 5-0 at home to Tottenham on Sunday night. Interim boss Simon Rusk has confirmed there are no fresh injury concerns but it is unclear whether Aaron Ramsdale […] The post Southampton vs Liverpool – Match preview and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Liverpool improve contract offer for star name, but club prepare for January meeting

arts.ttl: €60m offer prepared: Liverpool rival Arsenal for 23-year-old with 15 G/A already this season
arts.sum: Liverpool are reportedly preparing to try making a €60million bid for the transfer of Atalanta playmaker Charles De Ketelaere. The talented Belgium international has been on fire this season, contributing a hugely impressive six goals and nine assists in all competitions so far this term. arts.sum: Liverpool and Arsenal are reportedly both showing a strong interest in the potential transfer of Atalanta star Ademola Lookman following his superb form. arts.ttl: Why Liverpool boss Arne Slot isn't on the touchline for Southampton clash
arts.sum: Arne Slot will be watching Liverpool's trip to Southampton from the stands at St Mary's Stadium, as his Reds side aim to reach the semi-finals of the Carabao Cup
